testcase.name: should have user management flag
should have account management flag
should have role management flag
should have scope management flag
should have approval workflow flag
should have client management flag
should have audit logs flag
should have real time updates flag
should have all features enabled by default
should get auth server URL from runtime config
should get API base URL from runtime config
should get API timeout from runtime config
should get API retry attempts from runtime config
should get API retry delay from runtime config
should call getConfig function
should return session API prefix from runtime config
should default session API prefix to empty string when not configured
should default API base URL to empty string when not configured
should get OAuth client ID from runtime config
should get OAuth client secret from runtime config
should get OAuth redirect URI from runtime config
should get post logout redirect URI from runtime config when configured
should fall back to redirect URI for post logout when not configured
should use PKCE when enabled in config
should default to true for PKCE when not specified
should disable PKCE when explicitly set to false
should have required scopes from config
should return empty array when REACT_APP_OAUTH_SCOPES is empty
should have token storage key
should have refresh token storage key
should have non-empty scopes array when config is set
should have primary color defined
should have secondary color defined
should have light mode as default
should have theme storage key
should have valid hex colors
should have all required API URLs
should have all required OAuth settings
should have valid timeout values
should have positive retry attempts
should redirect to authorization URL with PKCE
should store state in sessionStorage and localStorage
should store PKCE code verifier in sessionStorage
should store debug info in localStorage
should successfully handle auth callback
should throw error if state does not match
should clear stored state after successful callback
should store tokens in localStorage
should handle token exchange failure
should use fallback user profile if introspection fails
should refresh token successfully
should throw error if refresh fails
should call OAuth2 logout endpoint with access token and clear storage
should use custom post_logout_redirect_uri when provided
should clear storage even if logout request fails
should not call logout endpoint if no token exists
should clear pkce_code_verifier from sessionStorage on logout
should log logout details to console
should handle logout with 302 redirect status
should use username fallback for email if email missing
should use sub for userId if username missing
should parse space-separated scopes from introspection
should use default accounts array if accounts missing
should get stored token
should get stored refresh token
should get stored scopes
should return default scopes if none stored
should check if token is expired
should return true if token expiration time has passed
should return true if no expiration time stored
should check if user is authenticated
should return false if no token
should return false if token is expired
should clear all stored tokens
should redirect to authorization URL without PKCE parameters
should not store code verifier when PKCE is disabled
should log legacy flow message when PKCE disabled
should handle errors during code challenge generation

testcase.classname: AuthService > handleAuthCallback - state validation edge cases
testcase.name: should continue with warning when no state is stored

testcase.classname: AuthService > handleAuthCallback - state validation edge cases
testcase.name: should use localStorage state if sessionStorage is empty

testcase.classname: AuthService > handleAuthCallback - state validation edge cases
testcase.name: should log detailed debug info during state verification

testcase.classname: AuthService > handleAuthCallback - state validation edge cases
testcase.name: should remove pkce_code_verifier from sessionStorage after successful exchange

testcase.classname: AuthService > handleAuthCallback - state validation edge cases
testcase.name: should remove oauth_state_debug after successful callback
should include code_verifier when PKCE is enabled and verifier exists
should fallback to client_secret when code_verifier is missing
should handle token exchange with error JSON response
should handle token exchange with non-JSON error response
should handle token exchange with error object (no description)
should log detailed error information on token exchange failure
should handle introspection response with all fields
should handle inactive token in introspection response
should handle network errors during introspection
should use default values for missing optional fields
should use empty email when email missing from introspection and JWT
should decode a valid JWT payload
should return empty object for non-JWT string
should return empty object for malformed JWT payload
should use JWT claims as baseline when introspection returns partial data
should use JWT fallback when introspection fails
should include client_secret in refresh request
should store new tokens after refresh
should handle refresh without client_secret
should include all required OAuth2 logout parameters
should generate unique state for each logout request
should clear all token-related items from storage
should use POST_LOGOUT_REDIRECT_URI from config
should construct correct logout URL with encoded access token
should store token with scope and expiration
should store empty scopes if scope not in token response
should store user profile as JSON
should generate code verifier with correct format
should generate code challenge from verifier
should base64 URL encode correctly

testcase.classname: AuthService > Edge cases and error scenarios
testcase.name: should handle very long token expiration time

testcase.classname: AuthService > Edge cases and error scenarios
testcase.name: should handle token expiration at exact boundary

testcase.classname: AuthService > Edge cases and error scenarios
testcase.name: should handle invalid expiration time string

testcase.classname: AuthService > Edge cases and error scenarios
testcase.name: should handle empty token storage

testcase.classname: AuthService > Edge cases and error scenarios
testcase.name: should return default scopes when scopes string is empty
should generate state with proper format
should store state in both session and local storage
should store debug info with timestamp and URL

testcase.classname: AuthService > Token exchange form data preparation
testcase.name: should prepare form data with all required fields

testcase.classname: AuthService > Token exchange form data preparation
testcase.name: should handle PKCE disabled

testcase.classname: AuthService > Token exchange form data preparation
testcase.name: should handle missing code verifier with warning
renders account management title
displays subtitle
displays accounts after loading
displays account statuses with correct colors
displays account roles
shows "No roles" for accounts without roles
displays account created by information
displays create account button
calls filterAccounts on mount
displays loading state
renders role management title and subtitle
shows loading state initially
loads and displays roles after loading
loads available scopes on mount
allows searching for roles
searches on Enter key press
shows no results message when search returns empty
opens create dialog when Create Role button is clicked
validates required fields when creating role
creates role successfully with valid data
opens edit dialog with role data
disables editing system roles
updates role successfully
opens delete confirmation dialog
disables deleting system roles
deletes role on confirmation
cancels delete operation
displays error when fetching roles fails
displays error when creating role fails
displays scopes with correct colors
shows "+X more" for roles with many scopes
refreshes roles and clears search
should render loading state initially
should load and display users
should show empty state when no users are available
should handle load error
should handle invalid response format
should display correct status chips for different user statuses
should return correct status colors
should filter users when searching
should handle search with whitespace
should not add userNames filter when search is empty
should reset to first page when searching
should display status filter dropdown
should filter users by ACTIVE status
should filter users by PENDING status
should filter users by BLOCKED status
should filter users by REJECTED status
should filter users by DEACTIVATED status
should clear status filter when selecting "All Status"
should combine search term and status filter
should reset to first page when changing status filter
should display default page size as 10
should handle page change
should handle rows per page change
should maintain filters when changing pages
should call API with correct search parameters
should open create user modal
should open actions menu when clicking more actions button
should open view details modal
should open view modal when clicking on table row
should open edit modal from menu
should open edit modal from details modal
should open manage accounts modal
should open delete dialog
should reload users after creating a user
should reload users after updating a user
should reload users after deleting a user
should reload users after managing accounts
should close modals without reloading when cancelled
should auto-hide snackbar after 6 seconds
should close snackbar when clicking close button
should display user accounts with roles
should handle users with no accounts
should clear error when dismiss button is clicked
should open admin sessions modal when clicking Manage Active Sessions
should close admin sessions modal
should handle response wrapped in data property
should fetch total count when page is exactly full (rowsPerPage=10)
should handle total count fetch failure gracefully
should handle total count response wrapped in data property
